def negative_recursive_traversal_risk():
    rule_id = "recursive_traversal_risk"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Direct recursion in traversal-style helpers that may be safer as iterative walks for deep inputs."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
